title: 6. Bleeding JinLin (DT .09).
text:
To treat soreness and pain of thigh, SanChaSan may obtain the best result. It is
also very effective to needle QiLi and JiuLi on the opposite side. ShuiTong and
ShuiJin are also effective points. Besides, it is also good to give blood-letting
around point BeiMian or to JinLin when the condition is severe.
